chapter_title.ar: باب فِي تَسْمِيَةِ مَنْ رَآهُ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 77 – Regarding the naming of the ones who saw him<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/14)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/14)
text: أَرَانِيهِ أَبُو مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام ) وَ قَالَ هَذَا صَاحِبُكُمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Ja’far Bin Muhammad Al Kufy, from Ja’far Bin Muhammad Al Makfouf, from Amro Al Ahwazy who said,
‘Abu Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> (11<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) showed him<sup>asws</sup> to me and said: ‘This is your Master<sup>asws</sup>’’.
en.sarwar: 12. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ja‘far ibn Muhammad al-Kufi from Ja‘far ibn Muhammad al-Makfuf from ‘Amr al-Ahwazi who has said the following. “Abu Muhammad (a.s.) showed him (the twelfth Imam (a.s.) to me and said, “This will be your master (Leader with Divine Authority).”
